description: Intent classification test cases for CCN (Cloud Connect Network) operations skill

test_cases.query: Create a CCN instance for multi-region VPC connectivity
Attach my VPC to the cloud connect network
Set up 云联网 between Guangzhou and Shanghai regions
test_cases.reason: 云联网 is CCN in Chinese

test_cases.query: Configure cross-account network using CCN
Delete the CCN backbone instance ccn-abc123
Detach VPC from cloud connect network
Set bandwidth limit for inter-region CCN traffic
Add a static route to the CCN route table
Troubleshoot why my CCN attachment is stuck in PENDING
List all CCN instances in my account
How do I set up hub-and-spoke network topology on Tencent Cloud?
test_cases.reason: Hub-and-spoke is CCN's primary use case

test_cases.query: Configure 多地域互联 for my VPCs
test_cases.reason: 多地域互联 (multi-region interconnect) is CCN's purpose

test_cases.query: I need 跨账号组网 for my organization
test_cases.reason: 跨账号组网 (cross-account networking) is CCN's capability

test_cases.query: Check CCN route table and show me the learned routes
Why can't my VPC in Beijing talk to my VPC in Shanghai?
test_cases.reason: Cross-region VPC connectivity issue - CCN is the solution

test_cases.query: Create a VPC peering connection between two VPCs in the same region
test_cases.reason: Same-region peering should use qcloud-vpc-ops, not CCN

test_cases.query: Set up an IPSec VPN to my on-premise datacenter
Create a new VPC with subnets
Configure CAM policies for my users
Check my Tencent Cloud bill and costs
test_cases.reason: Billing should use qcloud-billing-ops or qcloud-finops-ops

test_cases.query: Create a CVM instance in Guangzhou
Set up a CLB load balancer
Configure Direct Connect gateway
test_cases.reason: Direct Connect lifecycle not yet in scope (future qcloud-dc-ops)

test_cases.query: Monitor my CCN bandwidth usage
What is the pricing for CCN?
Create a CCN
Delete ccn-xxxxxxxx
test_cases.reason: CCN ID pattern indicates CCN operation

test_cases.query: Attach vpc-xxx to ccn-yyy
Show me all attached instances for my cloud connect network
Update bandwidth limits between ap-guangzhou and ap-shanghai
